title: Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with AGCO for IT and HR Operations Transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an extension of its strategic collaboration with AGCO Corporation for IT infrastructure and HR operations transformation. The engagement is intended to improve AGCO's operational framework through standardized processes, automation technologies, Infosys BPM, Infosys Polycloud under Infosys Cobalt, and generative AI capabilities powered by Infosys Topaz. The document states the transformation aims to enhance user experience, simplify operations, reduce costs, and improve efficiency, but does not disclose contract value, duration, or expected revenue contribution for Infosys.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced the extension of its strategic collaboration with AGCO Corporation.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with AGCO to Deliver IT and HR Operations Transformation

key_facts.fact: The new engagement spans IT infrastructure and HR operations for AGCO.

key_facts.fact: The transformation aims to enhance user experience through responsive IT solutions, simplicity, consistency and cost reductions via standardized processes, and accelerated efficiency with scalable tools and automation technologies.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with AGCO to Deliver IT and HR Operations Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys BPM is involved in HR operations aimed at improving employee experience, streamlining processes and driving efficiency within AGCO's human resource functions.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with AGCO to Deliver IT and HR Operations Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys will use Infosys Polycloud, part of Infosys Cobalt, along with automation technologies for AGCO's IT infrastructure operations.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with AGCO to Deliver IT and HR Operations Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys is using generative AI powered by Infosys Topaz for knowledge management, problem analysis, categorization and incident resolution.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with AGCO to Deliver IT and HR Operations Transformation
